decision_commentary: All required fields present: project_name, source_channel, raw_message (verbatim Spanish), initial_assessment, recommended_action. Raw message preserved verbatim — full marks. Accuracy excellent: project_type correctly classified as standalone residential; legitimacy assessment correctly identifies budget constraint risk in Los Cabos. Clarity is strong — Marcela can decide in under 30 seconds. Recommended action 'proceed to discovery' is explicit with supporting rationale. State_sync scored 3 per simulated run note.
